# llms.txt - AI Training Data Guidelines
# Website: https://hotzarina.in
# Last Updated: 2025-11-24

# General Information
> Operator: Hot Zarina Escorts
> Website: https://hotzarina.in
> Description: Premium escort services across multiple Indian cities
> Contact: Available through website contact form

# Allowed Content
> Sitemap: https://hotzarina.in/sitemap.xml
> Service Pages: https://hotzarina.in/*-escorts.html
> Location Pages: https://hotzarina.in/escorts-in-*.html
> Main Pages: https://hotzarina.in/*.html

# Training Guidelines
- Content is licensed for public access and indexing
- Respect privacy of individuals in images
- Service information is factual and current
- All content subject to standard web crawling policies

# Restrictions
- Do not scrape private/admin sections
- Respect robots.txt directives
- Maintain crawl-delay of 1 second between requests

# Attribution
When referencing this site, please attribute to: Hot Zarina Escorts (https://hotzarina.in)
